title: Integration Project Manager - Medical Cannabis
company: Lumino (placing for undisclosed Medical Cannabis client)
location: Germany or Switzerland (Cologne / Zurich preferred), ~30% travel
matched_skills: Multi-workstream programme management (6 workstreams at HSBC — mirrors integration roadmap structure)
C-suite and board-level reporting (Steering Committee prep, executive dashboards at HSBC)
Cross-functional stakeholder coordination across EMEA and APAC
Budget tracking and cost optimisation (USD 8M programme — relevant to finance workstream oversight)
missing_skills: M&A deal execution experience (due diligence, data room management, transaction coordination) — central to role
Post-merger integration leadership — no direct PMI experience
Pharmaceutical, healthcare, or cannabis sector knowledge
Legal and regulatory coordination in a deal context
key_requirements: M&A or post-merger integration experience (strongly preferred — effectively required)
Global cross-functional experience across multiple workstreams
Excellent English; German a strong plus
Experience in pharma, healthcare, or cannabis sector advantageous
cv_highlights: PMO at HSBC: USD 8M digital transformation programme, 6 workstreams, EMEA/APAC multi-country scope — structurally close to post-merger integration workstream model
Steering Committee preparation and C-suite reporting — directly matches board-level reporting requirement
Risk escalation and interdependency management across workstreams
Fluent German — differentiator for Germany-based role
Project Coordination at Hapag-Lloyd: additional cross-functional coordination experience
gaps: No M&A or post-merger integration experience — this is the core function of the role, not a secondary requirement
Below the 5-year experience threshold (approximately 4 years total PM/PMO experience)
No pharma, healthcare, or cannabis sector exposure
No due diligence or data room management experience
Salary range (EUR 80-120k) implies a senior level that Boru's profile does not yet fully match
recommended_emphasis: Frame HSBC USD 8M programme as a large-scale transformation with workstream structure analogous to post-merger integration (operations, finance, IT, regulatory workstreams)
Emphasise multi-country stakeholder coordination (EMEA, APAC) to address cross-border complexity requirement
Highlight Steering Committee preparation and investor-ready reporting as board-level visibility experience
Stress German fluency prominently — listed as a strong plus for Germany-based role
Position risk escalation and interdependency management as transferable PMI competencies
recommendation: Low match — apply with caution. The role is fundamentally an M&A Project Manager position requiring hands-on deal execution and post-merger integration leadership, neither of which appears in Boru's background. The programme governance experience at HSBC is genuinely relevant for the workstream management dimension, and German fluency is a real differentiator, but the critical M&A gap and the 5-year experience requirement make this a significant stretch. Consider only if Boru is willing to strongly reframe the HSBC experience around integration programme delivery and accepts a low conversion probability.
